name: Betelgeuse
description: A red supergiant star in Orion and one of the brightest stars in the night sky.

name: Sirius
description: The brightest star visible from Earth's night sky.

name: Proxima Centauri
description: The closest known star to the Sun.

name: Vega
description: A bright nearby star often used as a photometric reference.

name: Polaris
description: The current North Star, close to the north celestial pole.
